checks.summary: No common provider/API secret literals found in scanned production files.
No direct secret-bearing logger lines found in scanned production files.
CSP includes current provider hosts and baseline security directives.
Reader public card exposes metadata only and keeps sensitive fields private.
External lookup route returns registry metadata without manuscript or author-private fields.
Stripe webhook uses raw body signature verification and event idempotency.
Registry write route stores metadata/hash fields with HMAC and write-once document ids.
Package scripts expose baseline, evidence, privacy, and release gates.

limitation: Static privacy gate only. It does not replace hosted secrets review, legal review, Stripe dashboard review, or live registry replay evidence.
